textByHashes.926feba54467c4b8b9229eff3f97f2328723809f: Okay... You should probably get going then.
textByHashes.f28d0c8c0b98a494d1cdb35fdbb1c947764e945d: That's me. What do you need then?
textByHashes.09022e8bb1e6e83c75f860be8112382638d3248a: Ha! We've got ourselves a Billy-no-boats! Classic! Yeah, I can sort you out with a boat, but it's gonna cost you.
textByHashes.b327521957bd8108dbb70793eb13c41a6f42837e: Alright, let's have a gander at it.
textByHashes.ea903c5aa9f8f25bfd4d4f1636d65ca13db929c3: You've got no boat. You've got no cup. You're fresh out of luck it would seem, mate. You'd best hope you lost it here on the Pandemonium. If so, someone might have handed it in to Steve.
textByHashes.f6f3b1e11f6ba26b974aa34b7e1d3fabde8507ec: Hmm... Yeah, yeah, I can work with this. This old rusty cup will get you the finest raft I have!
textByHashes.9bebc1fe630614153ff5c84c3ac9fe81348089d0: That's right! The best one I have!
textByHashes.33d4934fe50b59bd6c7747217f541649216fd356: Sorry, mate, but even if you could, the raft is all I've got to hand right now. Besides, you're gonna want to build up some experience before you captain anything too big. A raft will be perfect for you.
textByHashes.283e6bcb4c32b3f9d34331b862b56ccb4ee5c373: Lighten up, mate. I'll have plenty more vessels in stock soon. Come back once you've got a bit more know-how and I'll be able to sort you right out.
textByHashes.ea43b8d442df8b2f6a1567a6a96f64534d8bac7a: Now, about your raft... With that cup I'll be able to sort you out with the finest helm, but it won't be enough to cover the sails.
textByHashes.b9eb76189b6a65a173db1496f60acb7729d856d3: Don't panic, you silly plonker. I ain't about to send you off on a raft with no sails. I'll sort them out for you, but I'll just need a little favour in return.
textByHashes.b498665a574a5871620b6ef3ee4f07946c557ccb: I've got some cargo I need picking up from Port Sarim and bringing back here. In return for sorting you out with some sails, I'll need you to go and collect it for me.
textByHashes.2dd301b44ad9c48a5518254c0915366552d3311e: Oh, and I tell you what, I'll even set you up with the materials to whack together a cargo hold. You won't be shifting that cargo far without one.
textByHashes.c9ba46bfdaa559190fa58f9d14bdb542940aaf3a: Now, hand over that cup and we can get cracking.
textByHashes.b0e69dc1dd27451715da585bbd7cf736f4ce54b2: Right, time to sort you out with a cargo hold. Let's head on over to the shipyard...
textByHashes.51b71387a31574c74c8e4e76690567b413516009: You'll want to grab yourself some tools from the crates over there, mate. After that, just use the gangplank to hop onto your raft. Once you're on board, you can get to work.
textByHashes.abe50291d78b33e0fe92f272950175058ab0db99: You're back! Do you have that cup? If so, let's have a gander at it.
textByHashes.c01d600e6d5f5afca4073d75398b832315f64ce2: Just use the gangplank over there to hop onto your raft. Once you're on board, you can use your tools to build a cargo hold. Don't worry about the materials, mate. I'm supplying those this time.
textByHashes.20e6bf0157b3ddbbf435492550d8b53c5dedb213: Very nice! Now, use the gangplank to hop back up here and we can get going.
textByHashes.8d8acf9d1645de72c4af84805ffb95c523a0e9b1: Smashing job on that cargo hold, mate. Let's get back to the Pandemonium, shall we?
textByHashes.cb0dc568a822b424c66667282f74d674d608b413: Okay, looks like that's you all sorted, mate. I'd say you're now ready to set sail!
textByHashes.7d4162438aad403c5309865de7c21ef90048a90c: Why don't you take your new raft out for a spin? You can head over to Port Sarim and collect that cargo for me. Oh, which reminds me, now that you're officially a captain, you'll need one of these.
textByHashes.fad47a7d6b7a1e5e8206013b56e3ff544b78baf6: Ah, seems you don't have room for it, mate. Why don't you come back later?
textByHashes.125ba294bca1d50ee5efef7298fa838371997c25: Your very own captain's log! You can use that to keep track of your adventures out at sea, including any work you might end up taking on.
textByHashes.4e4d3f7b3fc4497a4a7199c0eab0294769cd690b: Right on, mate! In fact, I'll make a note of that in your log now.
textByHashes.4b83b7ca165e8c9a475f975ef02f0b739473a410: And that's you all ready to go, mate! Just hop on your new raft when ready. If you need help finding my cargo, just check in with the port master when you get to Port Sarim.
textByHashes.4a6225d1a5205a5659e2e5a2ab3110a65d021637: Now, unless you fancy a cheeky dip, the gangplank down the docks will be your best bet for getting on board.
textByHashes.d34a74d63aaf1937a848e89525104b018062a9fd: You'll be needing one of these, mate.
textByHashes.8939357400a53a639ea8e40105d4467626055126: Ah, seems you don't have room for it. Why don't you come back later?
textByHashes.221e7d898bb83db89c0a04ba87a4591b31c0167b: You should be all ready to go, mate! Just hop on your new raft when ready. If you need help finding my cargo, just check in with the port master when you get to Port Sarim.
textByHashes.c2b029152c3a6f588009cf24e8ca27714af9bea3: Alright, mate. How are you doing collecting my cargo?
textByHashes.0426902cb4a6843ef01a300ca6ae57c2e756bd06: Well, you'd better hop back onto your raft then. Unless you fancy a cheeky dip, the gangplank down the docks will be your best bet for getting on board.
textByHashes.23494ca7dc5ce2a006cb569e60f92f7fa280f495: Very nice! Just hand that over to the port master and he'll sort it out. Come let me know once you're done.
textByHashes.8dc039b67dbe61ceeb8e26363b681eb4763fdf4c: Very nice! That's us all squared up then. You ought to pop back once you've got a bit more experience with that raft. By then I should have some new vessels for sale.
textByHashes.a4b85a6530e4d58145cb392ac511606eb7f0c40f: To be honest, mate, I'd say one of the best things would be to take on more work like what you just did for me. A lot of ports will have a notice board where folks advertise jobs they want sorting.
textByHashes.80c7bcbbcd240f25a0642832e6c1ed12e736df75: Well, now that you're officially a big cheese captain, you might want to start charting the sea for your own records. That log book I gave you has all sorts of cracking tips on how to do so.
textByHashes.89563ad032c26f70687b235bdd4965c1e6b4b128: Oh, and while we're on about charting, I've also chucked some useful bits and bobs in your cargo hold.
textByHashes.4f9152afc13804020a8d43ba5ecd31628560fb90: First up, I've left you a couple of repair kits in there. Perfect for if you go being a numpty and end up sailing straight into a proper big storm or a big group of sharks.
textByHashes.8d57bf595ea155ca94fc447ff233134b7b85f928: The other thing in there is a spyglass. It's a proper handy charting tool that's great for getting a good look at things while out at sea.
textByHashes.818aa310bd7838dd5168365d382f1a748738a7d6: There's a chap called Charles who used to be pretty good at the whole charting thing who might be able to help you more. You can find him down in the cave on the island.
textByHashes.985fab0d8c21531405b469ddc800676b39c8493d: Alright, mate. What do you need?
textByHashes.73deb6d10ee7441ff0fc2e8a168680766cb59d89: Sure thing, mate. Which one do you fancy?
textByHashes.b87bbd505e455098a2bfbc5fcb8b78cfe85393c0: Righto, mate. Just tell me which one you want to work on and I'll get everything set up.
textByHashes.dc5238526403090cdff00003f72ff95ef808ce6b: No worries, mate! Just tell me which one you need and I'll get a port wizard to zap it right over.
textByHashes.88244f69cec3130c9cb7aacd362dc0938520c41c: It's your boat's funeral, I guess.
textByHashes.c0562352953c7eec09a96ee3bebd7aa85ff6e846: Not a problem. Don't forget to see Charles down in the cave on the island if you need more help with charting.
textByHashes.e9773885ecb569425b165f696a897ee520fe3966: Are you sure? Looks like you've got one already.
textByHashes.7b22dc14c75a479ab920a6d5f468f8cd214a9c12: Yeah, I reckon I can probably chuck a few pointers your way. Let's have a butchers...
textByHashes.9c24cf9ea270a0ffda4ee7a4f272c0b59915f203: Right, you've got all sorts of ways you can buff up your sailing skills. There's port tasks, sea charting, shipwreck salvaging, Barracuda Trials, deep sea trawling, and probably loads more I've gone and forgotten about.
textByHashes.e0bff05de195680024a1fd481148e97cf6fca7bb: Sure thing, mate. You'll find that a lot of ports will have a notice board where folks have gone and stuck up some ads for jobs they want sorting.
textByHashes.7a21ae9e5d5fba396ad3b1bb82c082dfe50ca6af: Might be they want some cargo lugging about, or maybe they're after someone to pop out and do a bit of killing for them.
textByHashes.c2df4bed8be433943579db6485ad61f4161bcc27: Well, after you've gone and accepted a task or two, you'll want to keep your captain's log handy. It's good for keeping tabs on what jobs you're currently grafting away at.
textByHashes.c308616b1f007f18f517bf86ea9fc4acf600fb12: Also, if you're doing a bit of courier work, you might find it handy to get a couple of crewmates on board. They can help you shift the goods about so you're not knackering yourself by carrying one crate at a time.
textByHashes.eedaecb712e00e073a8b17bc91427daaff754e49: No worries, mate. Wanting any other tips?
textByHashes.656b8b26d3f267bac9ce11dfee21cea06cd4a4c2: Well, mate, sea charting is all about heading out and improving your own knowledge of the sea itself. Your captain's log has all sorts of cracking tips on how to do so.
textByHashes.9e9606e21dc2ef34fa78ee65a961f2e05ceb9c91: If you want to know more, your best shout's going to be heading down into the cave on the island for a chinwag with Charles. He's the local expert on this sort of stuff.
textByHashes.df5ea92cb9ebdf5ac70f88bac2dce3443608bce4: Not a problem, mate. Do you need any more tips?
textByHashes.83f1803502ebe0258830cc7128bd3b3731b9b780: Well, as the name suggests, mate, it's all about salvaging old shipwrecks from the sea. Keeps the place nice and tidy, and allows you to snag some swag from those that don't need it anymore.
textByHashes.0827d1f0059292da964764b6c9b1b49daa1e6a22: To get started, you're going to want to head over to the shipyard and sort yourself out with a proper nice salvaging hook. The flashier the hook, the quicker you'll be able to salvage.
textByHashes.e00f1513f547bdd6e6931146c762e574fce42fa3: Once you've got your hook all nicely set up, it's time to head out and find a shipwreck. You've got plenty of different types to pick from. Once you spot a good one, just use the hook to get stuck in.
textByHashes.305849cce0d45dbf587547f3ae0bcb35fa42a4e9: You'll want to keep salvaging until you're feeling chuffed with your haul. Then you just need to use a salvaging station to sort through it all. Any half-decent port's going to have one.
textByHashes.63dbc45899695d794713dc374796971ea9ca27c0: Always a pleasure, mate. Wanting any other tips?
textByHashes.bed0b0841b621a4f325093fb6ed397f470c3e465: Sure can, mate. The Barracudas are a top group of daredevils, but they're also proper show-offs. They like to head out in their fancy boats, giving it proper beans and pushing them right to the limit.
textByHashes.6661e35010ebb75568d146d54867243936459ddd: If you're a bit of a cheeky sod yourself, you might want to get involved in one of their trials. All of them are about speeding around and clocking the best time possible.
textByHashes.b52cfdb67f3ddb8fbca2667184f14ccf0ae567f3: Anyway, if you fancy it, the nearest one is just south of here in the Storm Tempor. Just don't go being a lemon and jumping in without a boat that's up to the task. Last thing you want is to go and sink!
textByHashes.19a16eae88043e213c256638a9c911baf95205f1: No worries, mate. Need any other tips?
textByHashes.ea309e7366f66c1ce6c7f0a896a9f672f1bd2f73: To be honest, mate, it's not something I'm properly clued up on. The basic gist though is that it's all about heading out in your boat to snag some fish that you wouldn't normally be able to get your mitts on.
textByHashes.9973c340514ee289046c6a50c39db83273db4b9d: Still, you don't need to worry, mate. I may not be able to help you, but word is there's a geezer who can over in Port Roberts. Kellan is his name apparently.
textByHashes.ed4d5b18f93782f334b5d5cb78b829cd5299deda: Well, mate, you're going to want to keep taking full advantage of the shipyard. If you don't keep regularly upgrading your boat and the facilities on it, you're just holding yourself back for no good reason.
textByHashes.2db8005f275a8d1868bbce97e70c672cbce2cfa4: Speaking of which, don't be afraid to sort yourself out with more than one boat. That way you can have different ones with different facilities on them. Do that, and you'll be golden regardless of what you're up to.
textByHashes.0cbab9a94165ee8710d0642a2039e96dcc40370c: Another thing to remember is that you don't need to go it alone. Get yourself a proper bang up crew, mate. They'll be able to help you with all sorts of things on your boat.
textByHashes.87a31e7960ba2fdebbce0ceee2c7d04107035d46: Just speak to the Crew Registrar down the docks and she'll get you properly sorted out.
textByHashes.571485e7521d445a28547b14bd9a2cfa22f2c427: Finally, mate, while self-betterment is ace and all that, don't forget to kick back, chill out, and enjoy yourself! Sometimes it ain't about the destination, it's about the journey!
textByHashes.12fe11460fb7ba97a905df24f89c15e620b63c79: Always a pleasure, mate. Need any other tips?
textByHashes.e0422ee1fcafd5e1f4a1100f1a1d5263e6fde468: Calm down, mate. You seem cheery for someone out in the middle of nowhere.
textByHashes.c275366543d9fe9736e795197e9a0a3e58d8ed5a: Well, mate. Some people like to call it Limbo... But I always thought that was the game with the stick.
textByHashes.0e7fa52ebd7ac51b89a301c7e7b6699c454f7c53: Somewhere out at sea. What does it matter? All the same, now you're here, isn't it?.
textByHashes.b8142f5a41f60e2403a3c2204174dcf790140f47: Alright, let's get you on your way then...
textByHashes.0bee77290829af2c76b2951dca0ad5939cf22161: Well, I thought it'd be nice to go on a little vacation. Get away from all the rabble.
textByHashes.fb5e7f9112b6b0e855e6c82cadddb69cf615776a: Didn't account for the rabble showing up here, did I?
textByHashes.9a311c376d4675bc246a56b6b7cb9b69fd6cfabe: Don't you go getting sarky with me, mate! Not like you ever work a hard day, is it?
